name: Chocolate Peanut Whirls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
1 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in egg and vanilla extract.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Add to the creamed mixture; blend well.
4. Stir in oats.
5. Divide dough into two parts. To one part, add melted chocolate; to the other, add peanuts.
6. Roll out each portion of dough between two sheets of waxed paper to form a 15x10-inch rectangle.
7. Place peanut dough on top of chocolate dough, removing all waxed paper.
8. Starting with the long side, roll up as for a jelly roll. Wrap in waxed paper and chill several hours or overnight.
9. Cut into 1/4-inch slices. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 10 to 12 minutes.
